name: BB:FalsePositive: Firewall Deny False Postive Events
notes: This rule includes Firewall Deny events that are false positives
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Firewall Deny False Postive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (1164104) %ASA-6-106015, (1153240) 106015
when the source is Local
when the destination is Remote
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Firewall Deny False Postive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (1164104) %ASA-6-106015, (1153240) 106015
AND when the source is Local
AND when the destination is Remote
